name: IpGetAddressAsNumber
title: IpGetAddressAsNumber
description: The function converts an IPv4 address string in dot notation to it's numerical value in network-byte order.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: The numerical IPv4 address to be converted.

return: 4294967295 (0xFFFFFFF, the equivalent of "255.255.255.255"): The specified address string was invalid.
